# VisualShaderNodeParticleMultiplyByAxisAngle

**Inherits:** [VisualShaderNode](class_visualshadernode.md#class-visualshadernode) **<** [Resource](class_resource.md#class-resource) **<** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

A visual shader helper node for multiplying position and rotation of particles.

## Description

This node helps to multiply a position input vector by rotation using specific axis. Intended to work with emitters.

| [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool)   | [degrees_mode](#class-visualshadernodeparticlemultiplybyaxisangle-property-degrees-mode)   | `true`   |

-  **set_degrees_mode**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_degrees_mode**()

If `true`, the angle will be interpreted in degrees instead of radians.
